## Example

```esql
ROW a = TO_GEOSHAPE("POLYGON ((0 0, 3 0, 3 3, 0 3, 0 0))"),
    b = TO_GEOSHAPE("POLYGON ((1 1, 4 1, 4 4, 1 4, 1 1))")
| EVAL diff = ST_DIFFERENCE(a, b)
| KEEP diff
```

| diff:geo_shape |
| --- |
| POLYGON ((3.0 1.0, 3.0 0.0, 0.0 0.0, 0.0 3.0, 1.0 3.0, 1.0 1.0, 3.0 1.0)) |
